Moving on

editor for computer-assisted reporting November 1996
Investigative MethodsJournalism & Newsroom

David Herzog, the computer-assisted reporting editor at the Allentown Morning Call, is departing in December to join the Providence Journal-Bulletin as a CAR specialist on their investigative team starting January 2.

Allentown (Pa.) Morning Call editor for computer-assisted reporting David Herzog is leaving the paper in December. On Jan. 2, he will become the CAR specialist on the Providence (R.I.) Journal-Bulletin investigative team
